tool_args.label: Fordham Road Bus Priority Implementation Timeline

payload.description: Spring: Present final proposal to Community Boards 5, 6, 7; other stakeholders. Early Summer: Implementation begins. Late Summer/Fall: Bus lanes expected to be operational. Post-implementation: Ongoing monitoring and engagement.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Spring: Present final proposal to Community Boards 5, 6, 7; other stakeholders • Early Summer: Implementation begins During implementation, Fordham Road will remain open. Public can expect to see minor traffic slow-downs while markings and signage are being updated. • Late Summer/Fall: Bus lanes expected to be operational • Post-implementation: Ongoing monitoring and engagement
